mapper.sql: id, drug_code, drug_name, drug_format, drug_unit, manufacturer, drug_dosage, drug_type, drug_price, mnemonic_code, creation_date, stock_quantity, low_stock_threshold, storage_conditions, instructions, contraindications, adverse_reactions, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM drug_info WHERE (status IS NULL OR status = 1) ORDER BY drug_name LIMIT 200
SELECT FROM drug_info WHERE (status IS NULL OR status = 1) AND (drug_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR mnemonic_code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY drug_name LIMIT 200

SELECT FROM drug_info
ORDER BY drug_name LIMIT 200
SELECT DISTINCT drug_type FROM drug_info WHERE (status IS NULL OR status = 1) AND drug_type IS NOT NULL AND drug_type != '' ORDER BY drug_type
SELECT DISTINCT drug_dosage FROM drug_info WHERE (status IS NULL OR status = 1) AND drug_dosage IS NOT NULL AND drug_dosage != '' ORDER BY drug_dosage

SELECT FROM drug_info WHERE (status IS NULL OR status = 1) AND stock_quantity IS NOT NULL AND low_stock_threshold IS NOT NULL AND stock_quantity <= low_stock_threshold ORDER BY stock_quantity LIMIT 200
mapper.sql: WHERE (status IS NULL OR status = 1) AND stock_quantity IS NOT NULL AND low_stock_threshold IS NOT NULL AND stock_quantity <= low_stock_threshold
mapper.update: UPDATE drug_info SET drug_code = #{drugCode}, drug_name = #{drugName}, drug_format = #{drugFormat}, drug_unit = #{drugUnit}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, drug_dosage = #{drugDosage}, drug_type = #{drugType}, drug_price = #{drugPrice}, mnemonic_code = #{mnemonicCode}, stock_quantity = #{stockQuantity}, low_stock_threshold = #{lowStockThreshold}, storage_conditions = #{storageConditions}, instructions = #{instructions}, contraindications = #{contraindications}, adverse_reactions = #{adverseReactions}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE drug_info SET stock_quantity = #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE drug_info SET stock_quantity = stock_quantity + #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE drug_info SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
